note: Per-product-root active-feature reachability for omena-query's THEORETICAL-RIGOR features, resolved via `cargo tree -e features -p <root> -i omena-query` (metadata-only, HOST target). Witnesses 'theory ships OFF': omena-categorical is a NON-optional R1 dep so no optional edge exists for the layer/matrix gates to flag — only feature resolution distinguishes 'crate linked' from 'analysis feature active'. theoryRigorFeatures are exactly omena-query's own theory features at HEAD; non-theory features (default, salsa-memo = RFC0009 perf) are intentionally NOT gated. Deeper dormant theory crates (omena-zk-circuit / omena-refinement / omena-variational) are NOT omena-query features and so are out of THIS gate's scope (they cannot leak via omena-query's feature set). REPORT-ONLY by default; the hard-fail variant is a surfaced, user-gated decision (deferral #79-90) — see the goal doc.

resolution.rationale: Host resolution is the safe upper bound: wasm32 (omena-wasm) can only DISABLE native features, never add them; z3 (smt-z3) is opt-in and confirmed NOT pulled on host for any root, so it does not perturb resolution.
